stdout:
Personal Quant System 体检

摘要
  日流程: SUCCESS
  纸面可用: true
  实盘可用: false
  执行状态: BLOCKED
  配置健康: WARNING

含义
  填写或导入真实成交，然后运行 `python -m quant.apps.broker refresh --no-console`。

执行阻塞
  - manual_fill_validation: ERROR (issues=3) -> research_store\reports\manual_fill_validation.json

执行提醒
  - manual_reconciliation: SKIPPED (manual validation did not pass) -> research_store\reports\manual_reconciliation.json

就绪阻塞
  - qmt_interface: qmt interface not configured

配置问题
  - manual_fill_validation: issues=3
  - execution_day_end: status=BLOCKED

常用文件
  - 日报: research_store/reports/daily_report.html
  - 执行看板: research_store/reports/execution_dashboard.html
  - 日终执行: research_store/reports/execution_day_end.md
  - 就绪状态: research_store/monitoring/readiness.md
  - 手工下单票据: research_store/reports/manual_order_ticket.csv
  - 手工成交模板: research_store/reports/manual_fill_template.csv

常用命令
  - 完整演示: python -m quant.apps.start
  - 纯 Python 日流程: python -m quant.apps.start daily
  - 状态: python -m quant.apps.start status
  - 路径导航: python -m quant.apps.start paths
  - 练习成交导入: python -m quant.apps.start practice-fills
  - 导入真实成交: python -m quant.apps.start import-fills --source path\to\broker_fills.csv
  - 归档当前报告: python -m quant.apps.start snapshot
  - 刷新执行链路: python -m quant.apps.broker refresh --no-console

已写入体检报告: research_store\reports\operator_doctor.md
